generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that countries with mandatory conscription have significantly lower military readiness scores? While some argue it builds national resilience, the reality is that professional volunteers often outperform conscripts in critical training metrics. In an era of advanced threats, shouldn't we prioritize quality over quantity? #NationalSecurity #MilitaryReadiness
